titles.title: For The Sake of The World

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I'm laying down my life I'm giving up control I'm never looking back I surrender all I'm living for Your glory on the earth

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: This passion in my heart This stirring in my soul To see the nations bow For all the world to know I'm living for Your glory on the earth

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: For the sake of the world burn like a fire in me Light a flame in my soul for every eye to see For the sake of the world burn like a fire in me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: For every knee to bow down For every heart to believe For every voice to cry out Burn like a fire in me For every tongue to confess You alone are the King You are the hope of the earth Burn like a fire in me
